summary: New sync_adapter module in crates/cclab-agent/src/ across 6 files (1372 lines total): (1) mod.rs (143 lines): SyncAdapter trait with 5 async methods (push_issue, pull_issue, push_spec, push_change, pull_code_index); SyncResult struct; SyncAction enum (Created/Updated/NoChange) with factory constructors; 4 unit tests covering SyncResult creation, update, no-change, and JSON serde roundtrip; (2) gitlab.rs (273 lines): GitLabSyncAdapter (P1) — auth via PAT header; push_issue/pull_issue via REST v4 issues API; push_change creates MR via merge_requests endpoint; pull_code_index fetches raw file content via repository/files; push_spec returns NotSupported; 4 unit tests including push_spec=NotSupported and push_change without branch = InvalidArguments; (3) github.rs (280 lines): GitHubSyncAdapter (P1) — auth via Bearer token; push_issue/pull_issue via REST v3; push_change creates PR; pull_code_index fetches via contents API with base64 decode; push_spec returns NotSupported; 4 unit tests; (4) jira.rs (275 lines): JiraSyncAdapter (P2, issue-only) — auth via Basic (email:api_token Base64); push_issue uses Atlassian Document Format body; pull_issue maps Done/Closed/Resolved→Resolved, In Progress→InProgress; push_spec/push_change/pull_code_index return NotSupported; 5 unit tests; (5) confluence.rs (210 lines): ConfluenceSyncAdapter (P2, spec-only) — auth via Basic; push_spec creates page via /rest/api/content with storage representation; all other ops return NotSupported; 5 unit tests; (6) gdocs.rs (191 lines): GDocsSyncAdapter (P2, spec-only) — auth via OAuth 2.0 bearer; push_spec creates doc via Docs API then inserts content via batchUpdate; optional folder_id param (Drive move deferred); all other ops return NotSupported; 4 unit tests. Also modified: src/error.rs (+3 lines): added NotSupported(String) variant; src/lib.rs (+8 lines): added pub mod sync_adapter and re-exported 8 public types (SyncAdapter, SyncResult, SyncAction, GitLabSyncAdapter, GitHubSyncAdapter, JiraSyncAdapter, ConfluenceSyncAdapter, GDocsSyncAdapter).

diff --git a/crates/cclab-agent/src/sync_adapter/mod.rs b/crates/cclab-agent/src/sync_adapter/mod.rs
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/crates/cclab-agent/src/sync_adapter/mod.rs
@@ -0,0 +1,143 @@
+//! SyncAdapter trait — generic async abstraction for syncing protocol types
+//! to and from third-party platforms.
+//!
+//! | Adapter                | Domains                        | Priority |
+//! |------------------------|--------------------------------|----------|
+//! | [`GitLabSyncAdapter`]  | Issue, Code, Change (MR)       | P1       |
+//! | [`GitHubSyncAdapter`]  | Issue, Code, Change (PR)       | P1       |
+//! | [`JiraSyncAdapter`]    | Issue only                     | P2       |
+//! | [`ConfluenceSyncAdapter`] | Spec only                   | P2       |
+//! | [`GDocsSyncAdapter`]   | Spec only                      | P2       |
+
+pub enum SyncAction { Created, Updated, NoChange }
+
+pub struct SyncResult {
+    pub external_id: String,
+    pub url: Option<String>,
+    pub action: SyncAction,
+}
+
+#[async_trait]
+pub trait SyncAdapter: Send + Sync {
+    async fn push_issue(&self, issue: &IssueProtocol) -> NovaResult<SyncResult>;
+    async fn pull_issue(&self, external_id: &str) -> NovaResult<IssueProtocol>;
+    async fn push_spec(&self, spec: &SpecProtocol) -> NovaResult<SyncResult>;
+    async fn push_change(&self, change: &ChangeProtocol) -> NovaResult<SyncResult>;
+    async fn pull_code_index(&self, path: &str) -> NovaResult<CodeIndexProtocol>;
+}
diff --git a/crates/cclab-agent/src/sync_adapter/gitlab.rs b/crates/cclab-agent/src/sync_adapter/gitlab.rs
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/crates/cclab-agent/src/sync_adapter/gitlab.rs
@@ -0,0 +1,273 @@
+//! GitLabSyncAdapter: push_issue, pull_issue (REST v4), push_change (MR),
+//! pull_code_index (repository/files). push_spec → NotSupported.
+//! Auth: PRIVATE-TOKEN header (PAT). Construction: new(token, base_url, project_id).
diff --git a/crates/cclab-agent/src/sync_adapter/github.rs b/crates/cclab-agent/src/sync_adapter/github.rs
new file mode 100644

+++ b/crates/cclab-agent/src/sync_adapter/github.rs
@@ -0,0 +1,280 @@
+//! GitHubSyncAdapter: push_issue, pull_issue (REST v3), push_change (PR),
+//! pull_code_index (contents API + base64 decode). push_spec → NotSupported.
+//! Auth: Bearer token. Construction: new(token, owner, repo).
diff --git a/crates/cclab-agent/src/sync_adapter/jira.rs b/crates/cclab-agent/src/sync_adapter/jira.rs
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/crates/cclab-agent/src/sync_adapter/jira.rs
@@ -0,0 +1,275 @@
+//! JiraSyncAdapter: push_issue (ADF format), pull_issue (status mapping).
+//! push_spec/push_change/pull_code_index → NotSupported.
+//! Auth: Basic (email:api_token Base64). Construction: new(base_url, email, api_token, project_key, issue_type).

new file mode 100644

+//! ConfluenceSyncAdapter: push_spec only (creates page via /rest/api/content,
+//! storage format). All other ops → NotSupported.
+//! Auth: Basic (email:api_token Base64). Construction: new(base_url, email, api_token, space_key).

+//! GDocsSyncAdapter: push_spec only (create doc via Docs API, insert content via

+//! Auth: OAuth 2.0 Bearer. Construction: new(token, folder_id).
